name: ShapeType
summary: Types of cross sections of linear architectural objects, like beams or columns.

enum_values.name: ePolygonal
enum_values.summary: Cross section bounded with a free, closed polygon

enum_values.name: eProfile
enum_values.summary: Cross section defined with a symbol from the library containing a closed profile

enum_values.name: eRegularPolygonCircumscribed
enum_values.summary: Cross section in a shape of a regular polygon circumscribed on a circle

enum_values.name: eRegularPolygonInscribed
enum_values.summary: Cross section in a shape of a regular polygon inscribed in a circle
